languages.text: Багряная пляска Кхейна слишком пугает свиту, чтобы та решилась пойти против Себериана.

traits.locale_text: Кроваворукий-в-ярости слишком пугает свиту, чтобы та решилась пойти против Себериана.

languages.text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine terrifies the retinue too much for them to dare oppose Seberian.
languages.original_text: Багряная пляска Кхейна слишком пугает свиту, чтобы та решилась пойти против Себериана.

traits.locale_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine terrifies the retinue too greatly for them to dare oppose Seberian.

The Crimson Dance of Khaine terrifies the retinue too much for them to dare oppose Seberian.

languages.text: Der Blutrote Tanz von Khaine macht dem Gefolge zu große Angst, um sich Seberian zu widersetzen.
languages.original_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine terrifies the retinue too much for them to dare oppose Seberian.

traits.locale_text: Der Blutrote Tanz von Khaine macht dem Gefolge zu große Angst, um sich Seberian zu widersetzen.

languages.text: La Danse écarlate de Khaine effraie trop l'entourage de Seberian pour qu'il ose s'opposer à lui.
languages.original_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine terrifies the retinue too much for them to dare oppose Seberian.

traits.locale_text: La Danse écarlate de Khaine effraie trop l'entourage de Seberian pour qu'il ose s'opposer à lui.

languages.text: 凯恩的猩红之舞令随从们胆战心惊，无人敢站出来反对塞贝里安。
languages.original_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine terrifies the retinue too much for them to dare oppose Seberian.

traits.locale_text: 凯恩的猩红之舞令随从们胆战心惊，无人敢站出来反对塞贝里安。

languages.text: La Danza Carmesí de Khaine aterroriza al séquito hasta tal punto que no se atreven a oponerse a Seberian.
languages.original_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine terrifies the retinue too much for them to dare oppose Seberian.

traits.locale_text: La Danza Carmesí de Khaine aterroriza al séquito hasta tal punto que no se atreven a oponerse a Seberian.

languages.text: 血まみれの武装した怒りの形相は、側近たちにとってあまりに威圧的で、セベリアンに逆らう勇気はない。
languages.original_text: The blood-armed-as-fury is too intimidating for the entourage to dare to go against Seberian.

languages.text: Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı maiyeti o kadar dehşete düşürüyor ki Seberian'a karşı çıkmaya cesaret edemiyorlar.
languages.original_text: The Crimson Dance of Khaine terrifies the retinue too much for them to dare oppose Seberian.
